raw_consumer_statement: I filed a dispute XXXX charge that I made from Home Depot for a defective item. Home Depot credit card never issued me a temporary credit. I lost the case and then Appealed. Home Depot then issued me a credit and I also received the email. Then several weeks the hike depot credit card charged me for the safe again! I called many times and they know they charged me even after Home Depot gave me a refund also they know they never issued me a temporary credit. This is complete fraud and illegal. The representative that I am on the phone with admits that this is not correct
